name: freyja-fjadrhamr
description: Freyja Fjadrhamr (falcon cloak) — motion-example hunting: browse 8 animated-component catalogs (Magic UI, ReactBits, Animata, Aceternity UI, Motion Primitives, 21st.dev, Originkit, Uiverse; 10,066 components), fetch open source directly, and capture-reimplement key-gated previews.
source: magicui.design (MIT), reactbits.dev (MIT+Commons Clause), animata.design/codse/animata (MIT), ui.aceternity.com (free components), ibelick/motion-primitives (MIT), 21st.dev (marketplace, browse-only without API key), originkit.dev (free library, key-gated fetch / capture), uiverse-io/galaxy (MIT, 3802 elements)
license: MIT (ReactBits: MIT + Commons Clause; Aceternity: free site-served; 21st.dev: per-component, key-gated fetch)
